_doc: Hand-authored, legally-sourced rules. Warnings-only. Not legal advice.

rules.message: This divorce involves minor children — a Child Support Affidavit (FM-050) must accompany the complaint and be filed before the case management conference.
rules.authority: 19-A M.R.S. §2004; Maine Judicial Branch divorce-with-children filing requirements

rules.message: Minor children: complete and file a Child Support Worksheet (FM-040) no later than 3 days before any hearing (FM-040-A if you share substantially equal care).
